testcase.name: T-API-21 - Verify that Test POST /api/plants/category/{categoryId} endpoint as Admin
T-API-22 - Verify that Test POST /api/plants with plant name shorter than 3 characters
T-API-23 - Verify that Test POST /api/plants with price equal to zero
T-API-24 - Verify that Test PUT /api/plants/{id} updates an existing plant successfully
T-API-25 - Verify that Test DELETE /api/plants/{id} removes the plant
T-API-26 - Verify that Test GET /api/plants as User
T-API-27 - Verify that Test GET /api/plants/{id} as User
T-API-28 - Verify that Test GET /api/plants/paged as User
T-API-29 - Verify that Test POST /api/plants/category/{categoryId} as User returns 403 Forbidden
T-API-30 - Verify that Test DELETE /api/plants/{id} as User returns 403 Forbidden
T-API-32 - Verify that Test PUT /api/plants/{id} with full swagger request body including id and category object

failure.message: [Plants API response status code] expected: 200 but was: 500

testcase.failure: [Plants API response status code] expected: 200 but was: 500
testcase.system-err: [Plants API response status code] expected: 200 but was: 500 qatraining.steps.ApiPlantsSteps.verifyPlantsApiStatusCode(ApiPlantsSteps.java:107) ✽.validate the plants API response status code should be 200(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/api_plants.feature:85)

testcase.name: T-API-31 - Verify that Test DELETE /api/plants/{id} on already-deleted plant returns 404 not 204

failure.message: [Plants API response status code] expected: 404 but was: 204

testcase.failure: [Plants API response status code] expected: 404 but was: 204
testcase.system-err: [Plants API response status code] expected: 404 but was: 204 qatraining.steps.ApiPlantsSteps.verifyPlantsApiStatusCode(ApiPlantsSteps.java:107) ✽.validate the plants API response status code should be 404(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/api_plants.feature:95)
